name: Neighborhood or Scout Troop Snax
recipeIngredient: 1 large can nuts (any kind; honey-roasted peanuts work best)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the combined cereal mix in a heavy-duty trash bag.
2. Have two children hold open the bag.
3. Tie the bag closed and shake to mix thoroughly.
4. Open the bag and divide the mixture into zip-lock sandwich bags.
5. Serve to the group.
